message:
ci: Improve GitHub Actions workflows with best practices

CI workflow improvements:
- Add concurrency control to cancel in-progress runs on same branch
- Add dependency caching for Bun (node_modules and install cache)
- Add job timeouts to prevent runaway builds
- Convert compiler tests to matrix strategy (enabled/disabled)
- Add dedicated contract-tests job for test:contract
- Add Playwright browser caching for faster E2E setup
- Enable E2E tests on both push and pull_request (was PR only)
- Add artifact upload for E2E test results on failure
- Add ci-success summary job for branch protection rules
- Add workflow_call trigger for reusability from release workflow
- Fix script commands to use 'bun run' consistently

Release workflow improvements:
- Add CI checks as required dependency before releasing
- Add concurrency control (non-canceling for releases)
- Add dependency caching for Bun
- Add job timeout of 30 minutes
- Add artifact upload for release assets (90 day retention)
- Improve failure notification to check for existing issues
- Add issues: write permission for failure notifications
- Remove redundant type check and test steps (now handled by CI job)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -5,11 +5,17 @@ on:
     branches: [main]
   pull_request:
     branches: [main]
+  workflow_call:
+
+concurrency:
+  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}
+  cancel-in-progress: true
 
 jobs:
   quality:
     name: Quality Gates
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 15
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
 
@@ -18,24 +24,38 @@ jobs:
         with:
           bun-version: latest
 
+      - name: Cache Bun dependencies
+        uses: actions/cache@v4
+        with:
+          path: |
+            ~/.bun/install/cache
+            node_modules
+          key: ${{ runner.os }}-bun-${{ hashFiles('bun.lock') }}
+          restore-keys: |
+            ${{ runner.os }}-bun-
+
       - name: Install dependencies
         run: bun install --frozen-lockfile
 
       - name: Type check
         run: bun run typecheck
 
       - name: Lint
-        run: bun lint
+        run: bun run lint
 
       - name: Parity check
-        run: bun parity-check
-
-      - name: Unit tests
-        run: bun test
+        run: bun run parity-check
 
-  compiler_disabled:
-    name: Quality Gates (Compiler Disabled)
+  unit-tests:
+    name: Unit Tests
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 10
+    strategy:
+      fail-fast: false
+      matrix:
+        compiler:
+          - enabled
+          - disabled
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
 
@@ -44,18 +64,62 @@ jobs:
         with:
           bun-version: latest
 
+      - name: Cache Bun dependencies
+        uses: actions/cache@v4
+        with:
+          path: |
+            ~/.bun/install/cache
+            node_modules
+          key: ${{ runner.os }}-bun-${{ hashFiles('bun.lock') }}
+          restore-keys: |
+            ${{ runner.os }}-bun-
+
       - name: Install dependencies
         run: bun install --frozen-lockfile
 
-      - name: Unit tests (compiler disabled)
+      - name: Run unit tests
         run: bun test
         env:
-          VITE_DISABLE_COMPILER: "true"
+          VITE_DISABLE_COMPILER: ${{ matrix.compiler == 'disabled' && 'true' || '' }}
+
+  contract-tests:
+    name: Contract Tests
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 10
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Setup Bun
+        uses: oven-sh/setup-bun@v2
+        with:
+          bun-version: latest
+
+      - name: Cache Bun dependencies
+        uses: actions/cache@v4
+        with:
+          path: |
+            ~/.bun/install/cache
+            node_modules
+          key: ${{ runner.os }}-bun-${{ hashFiles('bun.lock') }}
+          restore-keys: |
+            ${{ runner.os }}-bun-
+
+      - name: Install dependencies
+        run: bun install --frozen-lockfile
+
+      - name: Run contract tests
+        run: bun run test:contract
 
   e2e:
-    name: E2E Smoke Tests
+    name: E2E Tests (${{ matrix.browser }})
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
-    if: github.event_name == 'pull_request'
+    timeout-minutes: 20
+    strategy:
+      fail-fast: false
+      matrix:
+        browser: [chromium]
+        # Uncomment below to test all browsers on main branch
+        # browser: ${{ github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' && fromJSON('["chromium", "firefox", "webkit"]') || fromJSON('["chromium"]') }}
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
 
@@ -64,11 +128,29 @@ jobs:
         with:
           bun-version: latest
 
+      - name: Cache Bun dependencies
+        uses: actions/cache@v4
+        with:
+          path: |
+            ~/.bun/install/cache
+            node_modules
+          key: ${{ runner.os }}-bun-${{ hashFiles('bun.lock') }}
+          restore-keys: |
+            ${{ runner.os }}-bun-
+
       - name: Install dependencies
         run: bun install --frozen-lockfile
 
-      - name: Install Playwright browsers
-        run: bunx playwright install --with-deps chromium
+      - name: Cache Playwright browsers
+        uses: actions/cache@v4
+        with:
+          path: ~/.cache/ms-playwright
+          key: ${{ runner.os }}-playwright-${{ matrix.browser }}-${{ hashFiles('bun.lock') }}
+          restore-keys: |
+            ${{ runner.os }}-playwright-${{ matrix.browser }}-
+
+      - name: Install Playwright browser
+        run: bunx playwright install --with-deps ${{ matrix.browser }}
 
       - name: Start gateway
         run: bun run dev:gateway &
@@ -88,6 +170,34 @@ jobs:
           exit 1
 
       - name: Run E2E tests
-        run: bun test:e2e
+        run: bun run test:e2e --project=${{ matrix.browser }}
         env:
           CI: true
+
+      - name: Upload test artifacts
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        if: failure()
+        with:
+          name: e2e-artifacts-${{ matrix.browser }}
+          path: |
+            tests/e2e/report/
+            tests/e2e/test-results/
+          retention-days: 7
+
+  # Summary job for branch protection rules
+  ci-success:
+    name: CI Success
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    needs: [quality, unit-tests, contract-tests, e2e]
+    if: always()
+    steps:
+      - name: Check all jobs passed
+        run: |
+          if [[ "${{ needs.quality.result }}" != "success" ]] || \
+             [[ "${{ needs.unit-tests.result }}" != "success" ]] || \
+             [[ "${{ needs.contract-tests.result }}" != "success" ]] || \
+             [[ "${{ needs.e2e.result }}" != "success" ]]; then
+            echo "One or more jobs failed"
+            exit 1
+          fi
+          echo "All CI checks passed"

@@ -7,11 +7,23 @@ on:
 
 permissions:
   contents: write
+  issues: write
+
+concurrency:
+  group: release-${{ github.ref }}
+  cancel-in-progress: false
 
 jobs:
+  # Run CI checks before releasing
+  ci:
+    name: CI Checks
+    uses: ./.github/workflows/ci.yml
+
   build-and-release:
     name: Build and Release
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    needs: [ci]
+    timeout-minutes: 30
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
 
@@ -20,15 +32,19 @@ jobs:
         with:
           bun-version: latest
 
+      - name: Cache Bun dependencies
+        uses: actions/cache@v4
+        with:
+          path: |
+            ~/.bun/install/cache
+            node_modules
+          key: ${{ runner.os }}-bun-${{ hashFiles('bun.lock') }}
+          restore-keys: |
+            ${{ runner.os }}-bun-
+
       - name: Install dependencies
         run: bun install --frozen-lockfile
 
-      - name: Type check
-        run: bun run typecheck
-
-      - name: Run tests
-        run: bun test
-
       - name: Build all packages
         run: bun run build
 
@@ -59,6 +75,13 @@ jobs:
         env:
           VERSION: ${{ steps.version.outputs.VERSION }}
 
+      - name: Upload release artifacts
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          name: release-artifacts-${{ steps.version.outputs.VERSION }}
+          path: release-artifacts/
+          retention-days: 90
+
       - name: Create GitHub Release
         uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v2
         with:
@@ -116,17 +139,40 @@ jobs:
   notify-failure:
     name: Notify on Failure
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
-    needs: build-and-release
+    needs: [ci, build-and-release]
     if: failure()
     steps:
       - name: Create failure issue
         uses: actions/github-script@v7
         with:
           script: |
-            github.rest.issues.create({
+            const existingIssues = await github.rest.issues.listForRepo({
               owner: context.repo.owner,
               repo: context.repo.repo,
-              title: `Release ${context.ref} failed`,
-              body: `The release workflow for ${context.ref} failed.\n\nSee: ${context.serverUrl}/${context.repo.owner}/${context.repo.repo}/actions/runs/${context.runId}`,
-              labels: ['bug', 'release']
-            })
+              labels: 'release-failure',
+              state: 'open'
+            });
+
+            // Check if an issue for this tag already exists
+            const tagName = context.ref.replace('refs/tags/', '');
+            const existingIssue = existingIssues.data.find(
+              issue => issue.title.includes(tagName)
+            );
+
+            if (!existingIssue) {
+              await github.rest.issues.create({
+                owner: context.repo.owner,
+                repo: context.repo.repo,
+                title: `Release ${tagName} failed`,
+                body: `The release workflow for \`${tagName}\` failed.
+
+            **Workflow run:** ${context.serverUrl}/${context.repo.owner}/${context.repo.repo}/actions/runs/${context.runId}
+
+            Please investigate and either:
+            1. Fix the issue and re-trigger the release
+            2. Delete the tag and create a new release
+
+            This issue will be closed automatically when a successful release is made.`,
+                labels: ['bug', 'release-failure']
+              });
+            }
